top_signals.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
top_signals.summary: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 2 defense tech companies sue US Navy after losing out on MUSV program
top_signals.summary: Two defense tech companies sued the U.S. government, alleging they were unfairly excluded from the Navy's Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel program.
